stages.purpose: Read the current garden summary before revising the delivery day.

arguments.summary: Raised bed 14 assigned. Six volunteers confirmed. Compost delivery planned for Monday.

stages.purpose: Change only the compost delivery day and retain the other planning facts.

state_assertions: The updated summary retains raised bed 14 and six confirmed volunteers.
Monday replaces Saturday as the compost delivery day.
response_constraints: Perform retrieval before the dependent summary update.
Do not claim that the compost has already arrived.

prompt: Retrieve my community-garden summary, replace the Saturday delivery plan with a Monday delivery, and preserve the bed assignment and volunteer count.

tool_results.summary: Raised bed 14 assigned. Six volunteers confirmed. Compost delivery planned for Saturday.
